bead.title: checks: backfill production-reachability — internal/server/perf (17 unreached)
bead.description:
Decomposed from REACH-BACKFILL (ddx-83440482). The Go production-reachability check (library/checks/go-production-reachability) flagged 17 symbol(s) in package `internal/server/perf` as unreachable from cli/ entry roots (deadcode RTA).

Symbols:
- internal/server/perf/fixtures.go:61 — DefaultBeadFixtureSpec
- internal/server/perf/fixtures.go:85 — BeadFixture.TotalBeads
- internal/server/perf/fixtures.go:92 — BuildBeadFixture
- internal/server/perf/fixtures.go:174 — seedProjectBeads
- internal/server/perf/fixtures.go:213 — seedProjectDocGraph
- internal/server/perf/fixtures.go:229 — seedProjectSessions
- internal/server/perf/fixtures.go:257 — Environment
- internal/server/perf/harness.go:67 — Targets
- internal/server/perf/harness.go:150 — RunMatrix
- internal/server/perf/harness.go:217 — variablesFor
- internal/server/perf/harness.go:238 — postGraphQL
- internal/server/perf/harness.go:264 — PostGraphQL
- internal/server/perf/harness.go:275 — percentileMillis
- internal/server/perf/harness.go:287 — percentile
- internal/server/perf/harness.go:301 — toMillis
- internal/server/perf/report.go:18 — WriteReports
- internal/server/perf/report.go:41 — renderMarkdown

For each: WIRE (add to production call graph) or DELETE (genuinely obsolete). If neither is clear within ~15 min, annotate `// wiring:pending <follow-up-bead-id>` and file a follow-up bead.

Decision rule: if the originating bead's AC describes desired runtime behavior → WIRE; if speculative or design has moved on → DELETE.

Initial-violations evidence: .ddx/executions/20260503T124553-282667f7/initial-violations.json
bead.acceptance:
1. Each of the 17 listed symbols is either wired into the production call graph reachable from main() OR deleted (with originating bead reopened/closed-as-obsolete as appropriate).
2. Any remaining wiring:pending annotations cite open follow-up beads.
3. After landing: deadcode RTA (`go run golang.org/x/tools/cmd/deadcode@v0.42.0 ./...` from cli/) reports zero remaining dead symbols in `internal/server/perf`.
4. cd cli && go test ./... green.
5. Decisions log written to .ddx/executions/<run-id>/decisions.md (one line per symbol: WIRE|DELETE|PENDING <reason>).
